ddls:
CREATE TABLE "proteins" (
  "data_version" INTEGER /* Version of the dataset containing the protein information */,
  "ncb_acc" TEXT /* NCBI accession number for the protein */,
  "protein_count" INTEGER /* Count of proteins in the dataset */,
  "taxonomic_group" TEXT /* Taxonomic group of the organism */,
  "filtered_tax_group" TEXT /* Filtered taxonomic group for analysis */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the organism */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the organism */,
  "protein_name" TEXT /* Full protein name */,
  "blastp_bitscore" REAL /* BLASTp bitscore for similarity measurement */,
  "ortholog_candidate" TEXT /* Indication if an ortholog candidate exists */,
  "ortholog_count" INTEGER /* Count of orthologs identified */,
  "cut_off" REAL /* Cut-off threshold for similarity */,
  "percent_similarity" REAL /* Percent similarity of the proteins */,
  "susceptibility_prediction" TEXT /* Prediction of susceptibility based on analysis */,
  "analysis_completed" TEXT /* Timestamp of when analysis was completed */,
  "eukaryote" TEXT /* Indicates if the organism is a eukaryote */,
  "ecotox" TEXT /* Link to ECOTOX for further exploration */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "gene_id" TEXT /* Identifier for the gene associated with the protein */,
  "gene_name" TEXT /* Name of the gene */,
  "function" TEXT /* Biological function of the protein */,
  "sequence" TEXT /* Amino acid sequence of the protein */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the protein entry was last updated */,
  "curator" TEXT /* Name of the curator who reviewed the protein entry */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ncb_acc"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_proteins_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "taxonomic_groups" (
  "group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each taxonomic group */,
  "group_name" TEXT /* Name of the taxonomic group (e.g., Mammalia, Aves) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the taxonomic group */,
  "parent_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the parent taxonomic group */,
  "level" INTEGER /* Level of the taxonomic group in the hierarchy */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the taxonomic group entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the taxonomic group entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("group_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_taxonomic_groups_parent_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("parent_group_id") REFERENCES taxonomic_groups ("group_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "orthologs" (
  "ortholog_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ortholog entry */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Reference to the protein in the proteins table */,
  "candidate_name" TEXT /* Name of the ortholog candidate */,
  "similarity_score" REAL /* Similarity score between the proteins */,
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the analysis */,
  "source_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the source species */,
  "target_species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the target species */,
  "alignment" TEXT /* Alignment details of the orthologs */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ortholog entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the ortholog entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ortholog_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologs_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("ncb_acc"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologs_analysis_id FOREIGN KEY ("analysis_id") REFERENCES analyses ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologs_target_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("target_species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orthologs_source_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("source_species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "susceptibility_predictions" (
  "prediction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each prediction entry */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Reference to the protein in the proteins table */,
  "prediction_result" TEXT /* Result of the susceptibility prediction */,
  "confidence_level" REAL /* Confidence level in the prediction */,
  "method" TEXT /* Method used for the susceptibility prediction */,
  "reference" TEXT /* Reference or citation for the prediction method */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the prediction entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("prediction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_susceptibility_predictions_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("ncb_acc")
)

CREATE TABLE "analyses" (
  "analysis_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each analysis entry */,
  "protein_id" TEXT /* Reference to the protein in the proteins table */,
  "analysis_result" TEXT /* Result of the analysis */,
  "date_completed" TEXT /* Date and time when analysis was completed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the user who performed the analysis */,
  "analysis_type" TEXT /* Type of analysis performed */,
  "parameters" TEXT /* Parameters used for the analysis */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the analysis entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("analysis_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_protein_id FOREIGN KEY ("protein_id") REFERENCES proteins ("ncb_acc"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_analyses_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, admin) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Hashed password for secure authentication */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* User account status */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the species */,
  "scientific_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "taxonomic_group_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for the taxonomic group */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the species */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the species entry was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_species_taxonomic_group_id FOREIGN KEY ("taxonomic_group_id") REFERENCES taxonomic_groups ("group_id")
)
